description_long: This property features two modern, flat-roofed houses set within a rectangular lot bordered by tall hedges. The houses are separated by a central driveway and surrounded by manicured lawns, trees, and shrubbery, with a paved path leading to each entrance. The left house has a prominent glass-walled section facing the garden, while the right house includes a garage and a more enclosed, private backyard. Both houses have large windows, flat and slightly angled roof sections, and a mix of wood, concrete, and glass materials. The property includes a driveway that wraps around the perimeter, providing access to garages and parking. The landscaping is minimalistic, with geometric hedges and a few strategically placed trees for privacy and aesthetics.
description: A pair of modern, flat-roofed houses with large windows, wood and concrete facades, and landscaped gardens, enclosed by tall hedges and a wraparound driveway.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the property from above the front, highlighting the two houses, central driveway, and the surrounding hedges and lawns.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the property from the rear, revealing the backyard patios, glass-walled living spaces, and the open garden areas.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the property from the street side, focusing on the main entrances, garages, and the paved driveway leading to the houses.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a side perspective, emphasizing the garages, side yards, and the continuity of the perimeter hedge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass walls
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways feature simple, modern doors with minimal overhangs, direct paved paths, and no prominent porch or columns.
